questionHtml: Explain why the magnitude of the emf is related to the amplitude of the ground movement.
markschemeHtml:
The springs have a natural time period for the oscillation ✓

A greater amplitude of movement leads to higher magnet speed (with constant time period) ✓

So field lines cut coil more quickly leading to greater emf ✓

meta.title: Explain why the magnitude of the emf is related to the amplitude of the ground movement.
